title: Simple Recipes Unlocker
description: Unlocks all recipes for players when they join the world.
body:
# Simple Recipes Unlocker

This mod automatically unlocks **all crafting recipes** for a player when they join a world.

- Server-side (works in singleplayer).
- Support mod/custom datapack recipes!
- No dependencies.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VdBcgfig/images/2cdd960ca95e12e1d0759585537fb9711e027691.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VdBcgfig/images/4c36e6af454b5e6b1facdfd6e88d823e54941291.png)
